original_snippet_context: Discussion of a legislative substitute related to convertible notes and redemption of inconvertible paper money.
relevant_quote: Trata o Substitutivo da emissão de notas conversíveis e resgate do papel-moeda inconversível
justification: This describes the subject of the legislative substitute, mentioning convertible notes and the redemption of existing paper money without expressing an opinion on the Caixa de Conversão itself or a specific conversion rate.
